efficient.description: ~45 invocations/day, stretches tokens -- blocked agents drop to 1x/day, productive agents stay semi-frequent

high.description: ~193 invocations/day, full burn -- all agents at maximum configured frequency

meta.notes: Tier 2 agents are blocked on human action (accounts, API keys, payments). Switch to HIGH only after unblocking revenue channels.
